changes: Phantom Kamaitachi: Potency is no longer reduced after the first enemy.
Hollow Nozuchi: Potency has been increased from 50 to 70.
Kunai's Bane: Potency is no longer reduced after the first enemy.
Tenri Jindo: Potency is no longer reduced after the first enemy.
Pitch Perfect: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 55% to 50%.
Shadowbite: Potency has been increased from 180 to 200.
Barrage: Potency has been increased from 280 to 300.
Blast Arrow: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 60% to 50%.
Resonant Arrow: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 55% to 50%.
Radiant Encore: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 55% to 50%.
Ricochet: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 40% to 30%.
Chain Saw: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 50% to 35%.
Double Check: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 40% to 30%.
Checkmate: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 40% to 30%.
Excavator: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 50% to 35%.
Full Metal Field: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 40% to 30%.
Deathflare: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 60% to 50%.
Akh Morn: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 60% to 50%.
Revelation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 60% to 50%.
Sunflare: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 60% to 50%.
Exodus: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 60% to 50%.
Dervish: Increased movement speed effect has been changed from 25% to 33%.
Bravery: Effect duration has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Rust: Potency of the reduced damage dealt effect has been increased from 25% to 33%.
Rust: Potency of the reduced healing potency effect has been increased from 25% to 33%.
Haelan: Cure potency has been increased from 12,000 to 15,000.
Stoneskin II: Barrier potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Diabrosis: Potency has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Diabrosis: Potency of reduced HP recovered effect has been increased from 25% to 33%.
Primal Scream: Increase to maximum HP has been changed from 20% to 25%.
Primal Scream: Amount of HP restored has been increased from 20% to 25% of maximum HP.
Fell Cleave: The additional effect 'Absorbs 25% of damage dealt as HP' has been added.
Eventide: Base potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Eventide: Maximum potency has been increased from 20,000 to 24,000.
Fated Brand: Heavy effect duration has been reduced from 4 to 3 seconds.
Meteodrive: Limit gauge charge time has been increased from 60 to 75 seconds.
Phantom Rush: Potency for enemies after the first has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Ogi Namikiri: Barrier potency has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Kaeshi: Namikiri: Barrier potency has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Communio: Potency has been increased from 15,000 to 16,000.
Perfectio: Potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Uncoiled Fury: Potency for the first enemy struck, even when attacking multiple targets, has been increased from 4,000 to 8,000.
Repelling Shot: Recast time has been reduced from 12 to 10 seconds.
The Warden's Paean: Effect duration has been increased from 8 to 10 seconds.
Warden's Grace: Effect duration has been increased from 4 to 5 seconds.
Warden's Grace: The additional effect 'increases movement speed by 25%' has been added.
Harmonic Arrow: Potency when consuming 1 charge has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Harmonic Arrow: Potency when consuming 4 charges has been increased from 4,250 to 4,500.
Bioblaster: Effect duration has been increased from 9 to 12 seconds.
Aether Mortar: Potency has been increased from 6,000 to 7,500.
Aether Mortar: Barrier potency has been increased from 6,000 to 7,500.
Starfall Dance: Potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Saber Dance: Potency for enemies after the first has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Dance of the Dawn: Potency has been increased from 15,000 to 16,000.
Dance of the Dawn: Potency for enemies after the first has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Soul Resonance: Maximum stacks has been increased from 5 to 6.
Flare Star: Potency has been increased from 18,000 to 20,000.
Flare Star: Damage over time effect duration has been increased from 9 to 12 seconds.
Frost Star: Potency has been increased from 12,000 to 15,000.
Radiant Aegis: Barrier potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Megaflare: Potency has been increased from 18,000 to 20,000.
Everlasting Flight: Cure potency when HP falls below 25% has been increased from 12,000 to 16,000.
Deathflare: Potency has been increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Brand of Purgatory: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 7,500.
Holy in White: Recast time has been reduced from 16 to 15 seconds.
Comet in Black: Recast time has been reduced from 16 to 15 seconds.
Living Muse: Recast time has been reduced from 16 to 15 seconds.
Mog of the Ages: Potency has been increased from 12,000 to 14,000.
Retribution of the Madeen: Potency has been increased from 12,000 to 16,000.
Seraph Strike: Reduction to damage taken has been changed from 10% to 8%.
Adloquium: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Mesotes: Damage over time potency has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Toxikon: Effect duration has been increased from 6 to 7 seconds.
Toxikon: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Toxikon II: Effect duration has been increased from 6 to 7 seconds.
Toxikon II: The time between action execution and effect activation has been shortened.
Frontline: Damage Dealt increased from -20% to -10%.
Damage Dealt increased from -10% to 0%.
Damage Taken reduced from -50% to -55%.
Limit Gauge Fill Rate reduced from +15 seconds to +0 seconds.

new_content.name: Occult Crescent: South Horn
new_content.description: A new large-scale, instanced exploration encounter for Disciples of War and Magic level 100 with a separate leveling system (Knowledge), phantom jobs, and unique currencies.
new_content.npc_location: The Phantom Village (X:4.5 Y:6.6) via Jeffroy

new_content.name: The Forked Tower: Blood
new_content.description: A challenging large-scale battle for up to 48 players accessible upon reaching Knowledge Level 20 in the Occult Crescent.

new_content.name: One Last Hurrah
new_content.description: Side story quest required to unlock the Occult Crescent.

new_content.name: Arcane Artistry
new_content.description: Quest line related to obtaining phantom weapons.

new_content.name: Forging the Phantasmal
new_content.description: Quest line related to obtaining phantom weapons.

new_content.name: Wizened Testimony
new_content.description: Part of the Inconceivably Further Hildibrand Adventures.

new_content.name: Cultivating Hope
new_content.description: Quest to unlock Mamool Ja allied society quests.

new_content.name: Quest Sync
new_content.description: Automatic level adjustment system for Mamool Ja allied society quests to match player job/class levels.

new_content.name: Phantom Weapons
new_content.description: Job-specific weapons obtained and enhanced through the Occult Crescent quest line.

new_content.name: Mamool Ja allied society
new_content.description: New allied society featuring main and daily quests with a unique currency (Mamool Ja nanook).

new_content.name: Occult Record
new_content.description: Collection system tracking discoveries and progress made on the Occult Crescent.

housing.name: Occult Epitaph
housing.description: A replica of a sizable stone engraved with esoteric carvings found on the Occult Crescent.

housing.name: Occult Chair
housing.description: A plush seat undoubtedly filled with secrets. And dust.

housing.name: Knowledge Crystal Replica
housing.description: An inert reproduction of the crystals found across the Occult Crescent.

housing.name: Occult Table
housing.description: This table is well suited to spreading one's copious notes.

housing.name: Tiika Selvaas
housing.description: A Turali sandwich of lightly roasted meat and vegetables topped with savory olives.

housing.name: Celestial Sphere
housing.description: A mysterious orb showing visions of the cosmos.

housing.name: Crescent Trophy
housing.description: Though it may be difficult to explain how this elegantly sculpted trophy proves that you have visited Shades' Triangle and lived to tell of it, it will come in useful should any naysayers doubt the veracity of your claims to know the names of basic shapes.

housing.name: Occult Tablets
housing.description: The inscriptions upon these stone tablets defy any attempt to decipher them, but perhaps taking them home without regard for historical preservation protocols will help.

housing.name: Occult Crescent Map
housing.description: This map is believed to have been inked by a navigator whose vessel made landfall on the isle in years past.
